findings.evidence: `rg` hits: line 180 `theorem IsCharacteristicVector.add_two_mul`; line 188 `theorem IsCharacteristicVector.add_of_forall_even`; lines 182-185 and 191-192 both prove preservation by adding a modulo-two-zero covector.
findings.fix: Prove `add_of_forall_even` first and derive `add_two_mul` from it by showing `∀ v, Even (2 * l v)`, so the special case does not duplicate the general proof.
findings.issue: `IsCharacteristicVector.add_two_mul` proves the special case of adding an even-valued covector directly, while `IsCharacteristicVector.add_of_forall_even` at line 188 proves the natural general statement with the same parity argument.

summary: The characteristic-vector statements are mostly at the right level, including the all-lattice-vector equivalence, but one affine API proof duplicates a more general theorem proved immediately after it.
